options.name: <output_file>
options.description: Writes the TWF file to the specified file name

options.name: -pin
options.description: Generates a TWF for each pin instead of each net

options.name: -power_compatible
options.description: Generates a Timing Windows File suitable for Power Analysis

options.name: -ssta_sigma_multiplier
options.description: Specifies a sigma multiplier between 0 and 3. The value that you specify increases the arrival window by that amount

options.name: -view
options.description: Generates a TWF for the specified multi-mode multi-corner view only
